task: Make OpenClaw resolve near-match hardware model typos and answer connection questions from canonical repository evidence

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied repository authority boundaries, source-backed response rules, scoped commits, and production verification requirements.
Applied origin-main deployment flow, Mac mini runtime verification, secret hygiene, and exact residual-risk reporting.

verification.name: Knowledge index regression suite
verification.target: local knowledge API and OpenClaw bridge
verification.result: 41 Python tests passed and the Node plugin regression completed successfully.

verification.name: Real worktree typo and wiring query
verification.result: Normalized ESP8255 to ESP8266, selected smartfarm, ranked the ESP8266 config first, and returned A0, GPIO4/D2, GPIO5/D1, Wi-Fi, and MQTT evidence.

verification.name: Production routing regression
verification.target: OpenClaw plugin prompt and tool hooks
verification.result: ESP8255 connection prompts trigger mandatory Harness knowledge routing; memory, shell, and workspace-search bypasses are blocked only inside that run; ordinary and Saju behavior remains available.

verification.name: Production OpenClaw replay diagnostics
verification.command: openclaw agent --agent main --session-id codex-esp8255-grounding-20260724b --message 'ESP8255에 연결된 것들 알려줘.' --thinking low --json
verification.result: The repaired route used exactly one harness_knowledge_query call with zero failures and completed in 24.1 seconds, down from 59.6 seconds. It exposed a remaining source-authority issue because the Mac mini lacked the new hardware files and the answer cited test evidence.

verification.name: Canonical source ranking regression
verification.command: .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_harness_knowledge_index.py; python3 scripts/harness_knowledge_index.py --question 'ESP8255에 연결된 것들 알려줘.'
verification.result: Canonical implementation and configuration sources fill ordinary results first; test and review evidence remains available as fallback or for explicit verification queries.

verification.name: Final production OpenClaw answer
verification.command: openclaw agent --agent main --session-id codex-esp8255-grounding-20260724c --message 'ESP8255에 연결된 것들 알려줘.' --thinking low --json
verification.result: Completed in 27.1 seconds with exactly one harness_knowledge_query call and zero failures. It explicitly assumed ESP8255 meant ESP8266, reported soil A0, DHT22 GPIO4/D2, relay GPIO5/D1, and Wi-Fi/MQTT, and cited only canonical README and ESP8266 config paths.

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with scoped knowledge index, Harness bridge plugin and Skill, regression tests, canonical smartfarm hardware sources, reviews, and completion evidence; then force-install the plugin and restart the gateway
deploy.result: Every selected Mac mini path matched origin/main, backend port 8000 was healthy, harness-knowledge was Ready and model-visible, plugin doctor reported no issue, and the final production agent replay passed.
